top_signals.title: UK Labour Party Warned Against Tacking Left on Wealth Sharing
top_signals.summary: UK Business Secretary Peter Kyle warned his Labour colleagues against pursuing redistribution of wealth without first prioritizing economic growth, as the party faces a potential tilt to the left if Keir Starmer is replaced as prime minister.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says Iran agreed to not have nuclear weapons, but 'they can change their mind'
top_signals.summary: The president was speaking to the New York Post's "Pod Force One" podcast in a wide-ranging interview.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gulf tensions escalate as Iran hits Kuwait, US strikes near Hormuz - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Gulf tensions escalate as Iran hits Kuwait, US strikes near Hormuz  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman to meet with lawmakers, Trump officials in DC
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump signed an executive order about AI this week, which Altman voiced support for.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
